data.text/markdown:
Flow Cytometry Analysis

Workflow: load → gate → histogram (or interactive polygon gate). Add your own cells for density plots, median tables, etc.
1. Load FCS Data

data.text/markdown: 2. Gate Cells → Singlets (FSC / SSC → FSC-A / FSC-H)

(Alt) Interactive Polygon Gate

  1. Run this cell → draw a polygon on the plot
  2. Re-run the next cell to apply the gate
